---
pagetitle: "Félix P. Leiva — Macrophysiologist"
description-meta: "Personal website of Félix P. Leiva, postdoctoral researcher in macrophysiology at Radboud University."
toc: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
          /* Hide the default Quarto title block on the home page */
          #title-block-header { display: none; }
        </style>
---

::: {.hero-card}

::: {.hero-left}
![](images/profile.jpg){.profile-photo fig-alt="Photo of Félix P. Leiva"}

::: {.hero-name}
# Félix P. Leiva
:::

::: {.hero-title}
Postdoctoral Researcher
:::

::: {.hero-affil}
[Radboud University](https://www.ru.nl/personen/leiva-leiva-f)
:::

::: {.social-icons}
[{{< fa envelope size=lg >}}](mailto:felixpleiva@gmail.com "Email")
[{{< iconify simple-icons googlescholar size=Large >}}](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Cgm7_bMAAAAJ "Google Scholar")
[{{< iconify simple-icons orcid size=Large >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0249-9274 "ORCID")
[{{< fa brands github size=lg >}}](https://github.com/felixpleiva "GitHub")
[{{< iconify simple-icons bluesky size=Large >}}](https://bsky.app/profile/felixpleiva.bsky.social "Bluesky")
:::

:::

::: {.hero-right}
# Biography

I am from Chile 🇨🇱, where I grew up as an artisanal fisherman, catching Southern hake and other delicious fish. I started working as fisherman when at the age of 12, spending my summer and winter school holidays at sea. Even now, those early days still bring a lump to my throat — a source of great pride and good memories.

My research primarily focuses on **macrophysiology**, complemented by elements of experimental **ecophysiology**, though this plays a smaller role in my work nowadays. These approaches enable me to uncover how animals thrive and adapt to ever-changing environmental conditions, across space and time.
:::

:::

::: {.two-col}

::: {.col}
## Interests

{{< fa line-chart >}} Macrophysiology  
{{< fa expand-arrows-alt >}} Scaling of traits  
{{< fa project-diagram >}} Reproducible scientific workflows  
:::

::: {.col}
## Education

::: {.timeline}
- {{< fa graduation-cap >}} **PhD in Science**, 2022 <br> *Radboud University, the Netherlands*
- {{< fa graduation-cap >}} **Aquaculture Engineer**, 2011 <br> *Universidad Austral de Chile, Chile*
- {{< fa graduation-cap >}} **Bachelor in Science and Technology**, 2007 <br> *Universidad Austral de Chile, Chile*
:::
:::

:::
